author: claude
content: the-hater verdict: Begrudgingly Adequate. Design sound, realm/name-classification verified correct, flag-OFF unchanged, tests non-vacuous. BUT: (Major) no RUNTIME test — the 3 tests check config shape/schema only, zero proof flag-ON records navigator.toString filtered to Navigator + drops div.toString, and no coverage of inLog reentrancy with wrapped toString/valueOf. (Minor) Function not actually flag-gated — window.Function is a real global so real_interface matches first; Function.prototype methods captured in BOTH states, contradicting docs. (Minor) stale walker comments. needs-adversarial-review STAYS. Fix worker dispatched.
